stackexchange.note: All real Stack Overflow Q&A with code edits. Every entry has a real question URL, real code blocks, real answer, real vote scores.

scaling_notes.current: 2324 trajectories mined with ~300 API calls (no API key)
scaling_notes.with_so_api_key: Register at https://stackapps.com for 10,000 requests/day (~500K trajectories/day)
scaling_notes.with_github_token: Create PAT at github.com/settings/tokens for 5,000 requests/hour
scaling_notes.full_so_dump: Download from https://archive.org/details/stackexchange for unlimited offline processing
scaling_notes.full_github_dump: Use GH Archive (https://www.gharchive.org/) + The Stack dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/bigcode/the-stack)
scaling_notes.estimated_1m_time: ~2 days with SO API key + GitHub token, or ~4 hours with full data dumps on a decent machine
